title: 9 Natural and Effective Herbal Creams for Sunburn
description: Plantago lanceolata creams are good for sunburn because they have soothing and cooling properties. The cream is made from the leaves of the Plantago lanceolata plant, which are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. These compounds help to reduce the heat and pain caused by sunburn, making it easier to bear.
